11]

Results

[edit]
Main card (Paramount+)
Weight class Method Round Time Notes
Lightweight Rafael Fiziev def. Manuel Torres KO (spinning wheel kick and punches) 2 0:15
Middleweight Sharabutdin Magomedov def. Michel Pereira Decision (unanimous) (29–28, 29–28, 29–28) 3 5:00
Lightweight Matheus Camilo def. Nazim Sadykhov TKO (punches) 1 1:31
Flyweight Asu Almabayev def. Charles Johnson Submission (Suloev stretch) 3 3:33
Middleweight Ikram Aliskerov def. Brunno Ferreira Decision (unanimous) (30–27, 30–27, 30–27) 3 5:00
Middleweight Abusupiyan Magomedov def. Michał Oleksiejczuk Submission (guillotine choke) 1 3:25
Preliminary card (Paramount+)
Welterweight Farman Hasanov def. Eric Nolan Decision (unanimous) (30–27, 30–27, 30–27) 3 5:00
Light Heavyweight Abdul-Rakhman Yakhyaev def. Julius Walker KO (punches) 1 0:08
Middleweight Nursulton Ruziboev def. Andrey Pulyaev Technical Submission (neck crank) 1 3:58
Featherweight Kaan Ofli def. Javier Reyes Submission (arm-triangle choke) 1 4:16
Welterweight Daniil Donchenko def. Theodor Berggren TKO (head kick and punches) 2 1:35
Bantamweight Jean Matsumoto def. Bekzat Almakhan Decision (unanimous) (29–28, 29–28, 29–28) 3 5:00
Welterweight Tahir Abdullayev def. Jefferson Nascimento TKO (punches) 3 4:28

[12]

Bonus awards

[edit]

The following fighters received $100,000 bonuses. The other finishes received $25,000 additional bonuses.[13]

  • Fight of the Night: No bonus awarded.
  • Performance of the Night: Rafael Fiziev, Asu Almabayev, Abdul-Rakhman Yakhyaev and Daniil Donchenko
